name: MANNATECH INC
summary: Mannatech, Incorporated is a global wellness solution provider incorporated in November 1993, selling proprietary nutritional supplements, skin care and anti-aging products, and weight-management products. Products are distributed primarily through network marketing channels across 25 markets in the Americas, EMEA, and Asia/Pacific regions. In China, subsidiary Meitai operates a cross-border e-commerce model. Key proprietary ingredients include Ambrotose complex, Manapol powder, and MTech AO Blend.
